hero.title: Africa Awaits You
hero.subtitle: Extraordinary journeys crafted by Tanzania's finest guides

about.badge: 10+ Years of Safari Excellence — Arusha, Tanzania
about.title:
Born from a deep
love of Tanzania
about.body: Emmy Safaris & Tours Ltd was founded by passionate Tanzanian guides who believe every traveller deserves an authentic, life-changing encounter with Africa. Over a decade, we have guided thousands of guests through the Serengeti's endless plains, down Kilimanjaro's ancient trails, and across Zanzibar's turquoise waters.

whyUs.title:
Crafted for those who
seek the extraordinary
whyUs.card1Body: Born and raised in Tanzania, our guides carry generations of knowledge about wildlife, culture, and land.
whyUs.card2Body: Every itinerary is built around your vision — from private camps to sunrise game drives, nothing is off the table.
whyUs.card3Body: Licensed by TANAPA and the Tanzania Tourism Board, your safety and comfort are our highest priority.
whyUs.card4Body: We work closely with local communities to ensure our safaris protect ecosystems and empower people.

hero.title:
Rooted in Tanzania,
Driven by Passion

story.title:
A decade of wild,
authentc encounters
story.p1: Emmy Safaris & Tours Ltd was born in 2014 in the heart of Arusha — Tanzania's safari capital, in the shadow of Mount Kilimanjaro. Our founder, with over a decade of guiding experience across the Northern Circuit, saw a gap: travellers wanted more than a tour. They wanted a story.
story.p2: We built Emmy Safaris on a single principle: the best safari is the one that feels personal. We recruit only certified, experienced guides who speak the language of the wild — who can read lion pawprints, predict the migration, and name every bird at dawn. Today we are proud to serve guests from over 40 countries.
story.p3: From the rim of Ngorongoro to the summit of Uhuru Peak, from the spice markets of Stone Town to the pristine reefs of Zanzibar, Emmy Safaris takes you deeper into Tanzania than you ever imagined possible.

mission.missionBody: To deliver transformative travel experiences that connect guests with Tanzania's extraordinary wildlife, landscapes, and cultures — responsibly, authentically, and with world-class service.
mission.visionBody: To be East Africa's most trusted safari operator, known for expert guides, bespoke itineraries, and a genuine commitment to sustainable tourism and community empowerment.

values.title: The principles that guide every journey
values.v1Body: Real encounters, honest advice, no manufactured moments.
values.v2Body: Ten years in the field, certified guides, deep local knowledge.
values.v3Body: Protecting wildlife habitats and uplifting local communities.
values.v4Body: Every detail is considered — from vehicle to campsite to cuisine.
values.v6Body: Warm Tanzanian hospitality at every mile of your journey.

cta.title: Ready to write your Tanzania story?
cta.body: Browse our curated safari packages and Kilimanjaro routes, or contact us to build something completely bespoke.
